overall.description: A cinematic first-person view from a luxury high-rise apartment in a futuristic cyberpunk city. The camera slowly pans right from floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a dense metropolis to reveal a stylish interior featuring a holographic golden lion sculpture, modern furniture, and a panoramic aquarium wall. The scene transitions from bright natural sunlight to moody neon interior illumination.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from inside a luxury high-rise apartment, looking out through massive windows at a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape with towering glass buildings under a clear blue sky. The camera slowly pans right along the window wall, revealing more of the dense urban skyline while remaining inside the dimly lit apartment.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues panning right to reveal the apartment's interior living space, featuring a white leather sofa, a red neon sculpture, and a large panoramic aquarium wall. A holographic golden lion materializes and paces around the room, casting dynamic light. The space transitions from natural window light to moody interior illumination with teal and red neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment office area with desk and panoramic aquarium

events.description: holographic lion dematerializes and exits the frame as camera moves past
camera focuses on office desk area with scattered papers and desk lamp

agents.ego_description: completing the pan across the room to reveal the office workspace and full aquarium wall

modern adjustable desk lamp with a long arm
papers and blueprints spread across the desk surface

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the apartment's office area with a desk covered in scattered papers and a modern desk lamp. The holographic lion has exited the frame, and the camera focuses on the expansive panoramic aquarium wall dominating the background. The large windows are now visible only in the far background as the pan completes, showcasing the full depth of the luxury apartment interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera pan that transitions from a bright, futuristic cityscape into the moody, neon-lit interior of a luxury high-rise apartment. It begins by looking through massive floor-to-ceiling windows at a dense metropolis of towering glass buildings under a clear blue sky. As the camera glides right, the natural light fades and the scene shifts toward the living space, where a white leather sofa and a red neon sculpture appear while a holographic golden lion materializes to pace the room. The lighting then transforms into a palette of teal and red accents as the camera moves further inland toward an office area with a desk covered in scattered papers. Finally, the movement concludes by focusing on a massive panoramic aquarium wall that dominates the background, leaving the distant city skyline as a faint backdrop to the apartment's expansive interior.
